{"society_power": 4.0, "state_power": 1.5, "society_change": -2.0, "state_change": -0.5, "key_event": "WWI occupation, Majlis dissolution, famine collapse central authority", "reasoning": "The dismissal of Shuster, dissolution of the Second Majlis, wartime foreign occupation, and the catastrophic 1917-19 famine gutted both the constitutional/associational gains of the prior decade and what little central authority remained, though nationalist backlash against the 1919 Agreement preserved a residual mobilizational core."}
